name: Reasonable Cause and Good Faith Exception

eligibility.description: Taxpayers who can document reliance on professional advice, honest misunderstandings of law, or isolated mathematical errors.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a complete exemption from accuracy-related and fraud penalties if the taxpayer can demonstrate reasonable cause for the underpayment and that they acted in good faith.
